title: Fix 5 distinct ready bug beads using parallel exploration and 3x codereview workflow
description: Select 5 ready bug beads. Link each to this epic. For each: parallel explore (dir structure/spec/vectors + reads/greps). Claim, read relevant files, perform minimal fix focusing on validation/guards/resets/strictness matching file purpose (idiomatic no_std/C11, no comments, exact test vectors, no test changes). Run pytest vectors, cargo/ruff/clippy/fmt, bd doctor. Spawn 3 codereview subagents per bead (correctness, security, edge cases). Close all beads and epic. Use Beads exclusively. No git operations. Report final ready bug count at end.
notes: Commit: 37223ccd59ca8538876f94b59208e224daf886aa - completed large batch of zephyr, renode, coap_dtn, test vectors, rust/python fixes
close_reason: All 5 selected bugs fixed, additional type compatibility and normalization issues resolved per review findings, all tests pass, epic complete
